job_title: View job: Scientist 2-Spatial Biology and Biophysics
job_description:
• 3+ years of relevant experience in situ hybridization, imaging and spatial techniques, preferably in the Biotechnology industry.
• Strong analytical background Strong organizational skills.
• Strong written and oral communication skills.
• Strong troubleshooting and problem solving skills.
• Experience with the 10x Genomics Xenium platform is a plus.
• Skills in image analysis are a plus.
• PhD in Molecular Biology, Biophysics, Physical Chemistry or related field.
• Proven ability to design novel molecular biology assay schemes, as evidenced by peer-reviewed publications or published patents.

job_title: ASIC Design Engineer - Networking/ DPU/ AI Systems
job_description: • Experience designing complex ARM- or RISC-V-based SoC ASICsHands-on experience building complex Network-on-Chip (NoC) architecturesStrong knowledge of AXI / AMBA protocolsFamiliarity with P4, programmable packet-processing pipelines, or protocol-independent networking architecturesExperience with post-silicon debug, bring-up, and production supportExperience with high-performance interconnect, data movement, and SoC integrationSelf-motivated engineer with strong ownership and execution skillsStrong problem-solving ability and willingness to take on new technical challengesContinuous learner who thrives in a fast-moving environmentExcellent communication and cross-functional collaboration skills Seasoned ASIC design experienceProven hands-on experience developing high-speed, complex ASICsStrong experience across the complete ASIC development cycle, from RTL architecture to tapeout to mass productionSolid background in networking and packet-processing architecturesExperience collaborating across:VerificationModelingSoftwareHardware/system teamsStrong RTL design skills in:VerilogSystemVerilog AMD Partner Hub Authorized Distributors AMD University Program Strong programming skills in:C/C++Scripting experience in:PythonTclShell Investor Relations Financial Information Board of Directors Governance Documents SEC Filings.

• Programming/scripting skills (e.
• C/C++, Perl, Ruby, Python) Debug techniques and methodologies Experience with common lab equipment, including protocol/logic analyzers, oscilloscopes, etc.
• Experience with board/platform-level debug, including delivery, sequencing, analysis, and optimization Knowledge of system architecture, technical debug, and validation strategy AMD Partner Hub Authorized Distributors AMD University Program Bachelors or Masters degree in electrical or computer engineering Driving technical innovation to improve AMD’s capabilities across validation, including tool and script development, technical and procedural methodology enhancement, and various internal and cross-functional technical initiatives Debugging issues found during the process, bring-up, validation, and production phases of SOC programs Design and develop APIs for integration using either Java or Python language.
• Working with multiple teams, assissting test execution to make sure all features are validated and optimized on time Working closely with supporting technical teams Engaging in other software/hardware modeling frameworks Investor Relations Financial Information Board of Directors Governance Documents SEC Filings.
